/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 76D/CTS:76/WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/DEF:SHALL ABIDE BY THEAGREEMENT TO SPECIAL CONDITION OF PROBATION FOR GANGS MEMBERS AND ASSOCIATES, PREVIOUSLY FILED ON 02-25-13,/VF4:240/VF1/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:AS TO COUNT 6, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 76 DAYS COUNTY JAIL WITH 76DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/X:PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BETWEEN COUNSEL, THE DEFENDANT'S TRAFFIC MATTER IS HEREBY DISMISSED,  COUNSEL OR DEFENDANT TOGO TO THE TRAFFIC CLERK'S OFFICE AND DO THE NECESSARY PAPERWORK FOR THE TRAFFIC DEPARTMENT,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
